summary: Backend fully verified for auth regression, staff CRUD, role-scoping, and permissions — all pass. Frontend is completely blocked by a JSX syntax error in /app/frontend/src/pages/More.jsx (stray leftover markup lines 259-263 after the component's closing brace on line 258). Webpack build fails, so no UI (login/register/more/payments) renders. UI validation of Staff tab and WhatsApp reminder deferred until compile is fixed.
passed: POST /api/auth/login (admin@kirana.shop/admin123) -> 200, UserOut has role='admin' and shop_id equal to id
GET /api/staff as owner -> 200, includes owner as member
POST /api/staff as owner -> 200, new user role='staff' with owner's shop_id
Staff GET /api/wholesalers -> 7 items (matches owner's 7) — shop-scoped correctly
Staff GET /api/analytics/dashboard -> total_owed 16370 identical to owner's — shop-scoped
Staff POST /api/staff -> 403 {detail: 'Only shop owner can do this'} (require_owner enforced)

failed.evidence: Screenshot of red 'Compiled with problems' overlay; file viewer shows lines 258 `}` then lines 259-263 contain stray `` `)}` `` `);` `}`.

failed.issue: Could not verify UI flows (login submit -> /, register submit -> /, /more tab-staff visibility & add-staff flow, /payments whatsapp-remind-<wid> anchor with wa.me href + 'Namaste') because of the compile failure above.
failed.evidence: page.fill on login inputs timed out; only the CRA error overlay is visible.

action_items: Delete stray lines 259-263 in /app/frontend/src/pages/More.jsx (keep file ending at line 258 with `}` then newline). The component already properly closes at line 258.

After fix, re-run frontend UI validation for: login redirect to /, register redirect to /, /more tab-staff + add-staff-btn + save-staff-btn appending staff-list, /payments whatsapp-remind-<wid> anchor with wa.me/ href and encoded Namaste text, and absence of the button for non-overdue rows.
